---
name: get-weather
description: Gets the current weather for a given city or location using wttr.in. 
  Use this skill when the user asks about the weather, temperature, or forecast for any location.
---

## Get Weather

When the user asks about the weather for a location, run `weather.sh` with the location as the argument.

If no location is given, use "Melbourne" as the default.

After running the script, summarize the current conditions and temperature in a friendly sentence.
